instructions: Review entries, then set include_on_site to true. Run: python scripts/generate_html.py

vulnerabilities.title: Linux Kernel
vulnerabilities.name: Linux Kernel Improper Authentication Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Linux Kernel contains an improper authentication vulnerability which could allow for privilege escalation via the cgroups v1 release_agent feature.
vulnerabilities.cisaNotes: This vulnerability affects a common open-source component, third-party library, or a protocol used by different products. Please check with specific vendors for information on patching status. For more information, please see: https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=24f6008564183aa120d07c03d9289519c2fe02af ; https://www.kernel.org/ ; https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-0492
vulnerabilities.short_description: Linux Kernel contains an improper authentication vulnerability which could allow for privilege escalation via the...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

vulnerabilities.title: Android Framework
vulnerabilities.name: Android Framework Integer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Android Framework contains an integer overflow vulnerability that allows for code execution that could allow for local privilege escalation.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Android Framework contains an integer overflow vulnerability that allows for code execution that could allow for...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
